channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: Arkeep
item.description:
Arkeep

Manage backups across all your servers from a single dashboard.
item.content:encoded:
Arkeep

Manage backups across all your servers from a single dashboard.

item.title: Screentinker
item.description:
Screentinker

Open-source digital signage management software. Control content on TVs, displays, and kiosks from anywhere.
item.content:encoded:
Screentinker

Open-source digital signage management software. Control content on TVs, displays, and kiosks from anywhere.

item.title: Stashcast
item.description:
Stashcast

Save video and audio for later offline use and generate super-custom podcast feeds
item.content:encoded:
Stashcast

Save video and audio for later offline use and generate super-custom podcast feeds

item.title: Borg Backup Server
item.description:
Borg Backup Server

A GUI Manager for Multiple Borg Endpoints. Manage backup schedules, restores and much more.
item.content:encoded:
Borg Backup Server

A GUI Manager for Multiple Borg Endpoints. Manage backup schedules, restores and much more.

item.title: Faved
item.description:
Faved

Free open-source bookmark manager with customisable nested tags. Super fast and lightweight. All data is stored locally.
item.content:encoded:
Faved

Free open-source bookmark manager with customisable nested tags. Super fast and lightweight. All data is stored locally.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQQCAJ35R3VQQFH7M8FB5Z5V
item.description: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!
item.content:encoded: I hate it that almost all links in the Pangolin dashboard are behind the Enterprise paywall. Can’t we just use an app without these prompts to upgrade our accounts? I hate it!

item.title: Moonfin
item.description:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.
item.content:encoded:
Moonfin

Moonfin for Android TV is an enhanced Jellyfin client derived from the official Jellyfin Android TV project, optimized for a different viewing experience on Android TV, Nvidia Shield, and Amazon Fire TV devices. Moonfin also supports Emby Server 4.8.0.0+, allowing you to connect to either Jellyfin or Emby from a single app.

item.title: SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing
item.description:
SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing

Share files and notes securely and encrypted with SkySend. Whether texts, passwords, SSH keys or code snippets - all end-to-end encrypted, automatically deleted, and completely free.
This is an alternative to Enclosed, but with API support. I wonder when will it offer username and password for admin, though.
item.content:encoded:
SkySend | Encrypted File & Note Sharing

Share files and notes securely and encrypted with SkySend. Whether texts, passwords, SSH keys or code snippets - all end-to-end encrypted, automatically deleted, and completely free.
This is an alternative to Enclosed, but with API support. I wonder when will it offer username and password for admin, though.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ965KDH70B3YTGPJGW9Y3P5
item.description:
AFPSLAI declares an Expected Distribution Advance (EDA) rate of 13.5% per annum or 3.375% for the 1st Quarter 2026. EDA payout and release of checks representing excess CCA/EDA starts on April 27, 2026 (Monday).

Sad news for AFPSLAI investors, dividend decreased from the previous 17% to 13.5% per annum.
item.content:encoded:
AFPSLAI declares an Expected Distribution Advance (EDA) rate of 13.5% per annum or 3.375% for the 1st Quarter 2026. EDA payout and release of checks representing excess CCA/EDA starts on April 27, 2026 (Monday).

Sad news for AFPSLAI investors, dividend decreased from the previous 17% to 13.5% per annum.

item.title: Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure
item.description:
Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure

This will sync Plugin settings as well.
item.content:encoded:
Obsidian LiveSync Settings to Configure

This will sync Plugin settings as well.
